biography: Celeste O'Connor (born December 2, 1998) is a Kenyan-born American actor. They were born in Nairobi, Kenya and raised in Baltimore, MD for the majority of their life. They live in Baltimore with their mother, father, and younger brother. They attend college, studying Public Health, Islamic Studies and Pre-Medicine. Celeste began their career as an actor with their first independent film, Wetlands (2017).
name: Celeste O'Connor
